name: Pm Capital Global Opportunities Fund Limited
analysis: PGF has reclaimed its short-term moving averages — the 9 has crossed up through the 26 and price is back above both. Price has broken above the base high at A$3.0700. Trade idea: entry A$3.1200, stop A$2.9403, target A$3.6591 (3.00:1) — then trail it.
